No Poverty.reason: Course focuses on job preparation and career planning, which indirectly supports economic self-sufficiency and access to economic resources (Target 1.4).

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course description, objectives, or activities relates to food, agriculture, or hunger.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course description, objectives, or activities relates to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly develops "relevant skills for employment" (Target 4.4) through job preparation and communication training.

Gender Equality.reason: By equipping all students with job hunting skills, the course implicitly supports equal opportunities in economic life, aligning with Target 5.5.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course description, objectives, or activities relates to clean water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course description, objectives, or activities relates to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course's core purpose is job preparation, job hunting, and effective communication in business, directly supporting decent work and employment (Targets 8.5, 8.6).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Problem-solving and persuasive speech skills, taught in the course, are foundational for innovation, providing a minor, indirect link to Target 9.5.
evidence: 問題解決能力(Students will acquire problem solving skills.)

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Equipping all students with job skills promotes economic inclusion and equal opportunity, contributing to reduced inequalities (Targets 10.2, 10.3).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course description, objectives, or activities relates to sustainable cities and communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course explicitly aims for students to "understand and identify ethics, social responsibility, and sustainability issues," directly supporting responsible business practices (Target 12.6).

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or strong indirect evidence in the course relates to climate action, mitigation, or adaptation.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course description, objectives, or activities relates to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course description, objectives, or activities relates to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Training in ethics, negotiating, and crisis management supports the development of effective, accountable, and transparent institutions (Target 16.6) and can reduce corruption (Target 16.5).
evidence: 理解與辨別道德、社會責任 (understand and be able to identify ethics, social responsibility)

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course develops professional communication and teamwork skills, which are essential for building effective multi-stakeholder partnerships (Target 17.17).
evidence: 團隊合作與領導能力(Students will be able to work effectively in teams as well as develop leadership skills.)
